meta.title: Detection of the Human Rhinovirus Minor Group Receptor on Renaturing Western Blots

abstractHtml: The human rhinovirus minor group receptor was extracted from HeLa cell membranes and partially purified. Receptor activity was detected on Western blots by binding of 35S-labelled human rhinovirus serotype 2 to the immobilized protein at a position corresponding to an Mr of 120 x 103.
